name: add_component
description: Add a component to one or more GameObjects. Supports comma-separated names to add the same component to multiple objects in one call (e.g. 'Enemy1,Enemy2,Boss'). The script must be compiled — if just created, call refresh_assets with wait_for_compilation=true first. Will error if Unity is compiling or in Play mode.

game_object_name.description: Name of the GameObject, or comma-separated names for batch add (e.g. 'Player,Enemy,NPC').
